messages.text: Hi! I found your portfolio on Instagram. Are you taking new clients? We're opening a cafe at Joo Chiat and need a website.
What's your availability like next month?
Hi Jasmine, thanks for reaching out! I have availability from the second week of next month. Happy to chat about the project.
Hi, can you send a quotation for a 12-page brand deck? It's for our investor pitch.
We'd need the pricing by Friday for our budget meeting.
Sure Marcus, I'll send the proposal and pricing by Thursday.
Hey, we launched the new website but the colours look off on mobile.
The header is also overlapping the menu on my phone. Can you take a look?
Sorry about that! Checking now, will push a fix today.
Steady lah. Don't bring your laptop this time ah.
Lunch tomorrow? Long time never catch up!
Okay! Oh and happy belated birthday by the way. Also, my company needs a banner design for our year-end event — how much do you charge?
